messages.content:
Summarize the CVE description using professional cybersecurity terms.

An issue was discovered in CALDERA 2.8.1. It contains multiple reflected, stored, and self XSS vulnerabilities that may be exploited by authenticated and unauthenticated attackers.
CALDERA 2.8.1 contains multiple XSS vulnerabilities which include reflected, stored, and self XSS. These vulnerabilities can be exploited by both authenticated and unauthenticated attackers.
